title: Blue Skies Industrial
description: This mod allows various industrial mods to process the ores found in Blue Skies.
body:
Want to double the ore yield from blue skies using industrial mod machinery?
This mod is for you.
We plan to ensure compatibility with more industrialization mods than currently implemented in future updates to Blue Skies. Stay tuned!
Currently supports MEKANISM and Tinkers' Construct and Create.
